tender_sources.name: KPPP
tender_sources.notes: Undocumented REST API. Ward number extractable from tender title ~65% of time.

rti.notes: Karnataka state govt bodies. Fee via IPO/DD/Court fee stamp. No online portal for state-level RTI.

data_notes: BBMP dissolved Sept 2025, replaced by Greater Bengaluru Authority (GBA) + 5 city corporations. Ward boundaries (243 wards, 2022 delimitation) remain valid. Officer directory not publicly available — requires RTI or manual compilation.
